title: Kajabi Help Center: Access in China
factSupported: Kajabi uses Wistia for video hosting, which may be blocked or slow in Mainland China.
limitations: Subject to change based on firewall policies.
notes: Requires clients to test access locally.

title: W3C Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1
factSupported: Accessibility guidelines apply universally, though local standards may map to WCAG.
